title: Deploy App Service with deployment slots and warm-up
description: Stage to a non-production slot, warm it, then swap so traffic shifts to an already-initialized instance with the right slot settings.
body: Use when deploying to Azure App Service and you want zero-downtime releases. Do not deploy straight to the production slot or forget which settings are slot-sticky. Actions: deploy to a staging slot, configure slot-specific settings (connection strings, slot setting flags) so they don't follow the swap, trigger warm-up via applicationInitialization so the slot is hot, then swap. Validation signals include the staging slot passing health checks before swap, no cold-start latency after swap, and slot-sticky settings staying with their slot. Risk boundary: swapping into production is a release action; verify health and have rollback (swap back) ready.
